---
title: "CoNLL 2020: Pushing the Envelope of Scientific Understanding"
description: "Reviewer instructions for CoNLL 2020 — push the science, not just the SOTA."
author: "synesis"
date: "2020-08-01"
categories: [NLP, conference, research]
image: cover.jpg
---

![CoNLL 2020 reviewer instructions.](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

CoNLL 2020 reviewer instructions. The NLP field needs work pushing the envelope of scientific understanding, not just pursuing SOTA!


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_conll2020-nlp-activity-6695427445631303680-pdng).*
